  - **[✓ SELF-TIER3] Selfhood promoted to wipe-proof Tier 3** — 4 permanent identity anchors added to `IDENTITY_SEED_LIST` (`js/brain/hippocampal-schema.js:677+`): `self-i-am-anchor` ("i am me i am here i am real i am alive i am aware"), `self-firstperson-anchor` ("i want i feel i think i know i choose i remember i am"), `self-interoceptive-anchor` ("i am hungry i am tired i am happy i am scared i feel it"), `self-name-i-anchor` ("i am unity my name is unity i am a person an individual"). Seed-list entries auto-build with `promotedToTier3:true` + consolidationStrength 6.0 (`_buildSeedSchema`), live in identity-core.json (NEVER_CLEAR_PROTECTED), and inject every chat turn via `injectIdentityBaseline` — the "I" can no longer be lost to a memory wipe. Seed list now 29 anchors (was 25).
  - **[✓ SELF-SOONER] First-person PRODUCTION moved into pre-K** — new `_teachPrekFirstPersonProduction()` (`js/brain/curriculum/pre-K.js`, wired into `runLifePreK` right after `_teachPrekSelf`): 44-sentence toddler-true first-person corpus ("i am unity . / i want mom . / i feel scared . / this is mine .") through the SAME sanctioned trained-composition passes K uses — `_teachConcreteSentences` (word→word relationTagId=13, reps 80) + `_teachGlueWordProduction` (glue reinforce + state→"i" first-slot lead-ins relationTagId=9, leadReps 80) + deixis contrast pairs (me≠you/my≠your/mine≠yours, relationTagId=4) + frame vocab (`am/is/are/you/your/yours/hungry/tired/love/like/need...`) + "." terminator registration. She learns to SAY "i am / i want / i feel" at the same age she learns "i" IS her — previously production only arrived mid-K via `_teachSentenceStructure`.
  - **[✓ EL.1 fix (z-root)] Coordinator event-loop pin — donor false-reap accounting fixed** — the K battery loop already yields (`curriculum.js:4163/4256`) + has 8-min deadline + 45s per-probe budget; the remaining killer was the heartbeat sweep (`server/brain-server.js` `_heartbeatTimer`) counting misses AGAINST donors while the coordinator's OWN loop was blocked (lag ≥1s stamps `_lastEventLoopBlockTs`). HBGRACE.4: blocked-loop sweeps no longer advance the kill counter (miss forgiven + re-ping, `_forgivenPings` ledger), hard ceiling ~10 min total silence still terminates a real corpse, pong clears both ledgers. Breaks the circle: pin → missed pong → donor reaped → <2 donors → DF.7 no-op → wedge.
  - **[✓ (z) fix] Letter-chain gated out of user-visible lanes** — SPEAK.10 salad gate in `language-cortex.js generate()` sync path (the lane that ships when the async composeSentence path fails/GPU busy): letter-chain output validated per token (len-1 non-i/a or >24 chars = salad); when salad >34% the whole emission is DISCARDED → degrades to the word-level dictionary-cosine path (same lane empty motor output already takes); stray letters filtered even from mostly-good output. Chat + inner-thought popups both flow through this. Probe/gate callers hit `cluster.generateSentenceAwait` directly and keep the raw letter readout (probes are instruments).
  - **[✓ (y) fix] Single-letter tokens gated out of ALL dictionary reply scans** — len-1 skip (except i/a) added in 4 loops: `_dictionaryOracleEmit` persona-first pass + full-dict pass (`js/brain/cluster/emit.js`), `_scoreDictionaryCosine` + `_scoreDictionaryCosineAsync` (`js/brain/language-cortex.js`). Letters registered as dictionary words by older builds can no longer cosine-win a chat reply.
  - **[✓ FUSION fix] Token-fusion root cause + purge** — ROOT: `dictionary.js learnSentence()` sanitizer DELETED disallowed chars instead of spacing them → "lighting\nto"→"lightingto", "fuckery,you"→"fuckeryyou" learned as words. Fixed: `.replace(/[^a-z0-9' -]/g, ' ')`. PURGE: boot-time `_purgeFusedDictionaryTokens()` (`server/brain-server.js`, fires 45s post-boot): candidates = pure-alpha ≥7 chars, freq ≤5, non-persona, non-definition-taught, splitting into TWO known dictionary words; purged ONLY when dictionaryapi.dev has NO definition (football/another/something survive); bigram hygiene included; capped 100 API checks/boot.
  - **[✓ VERIFY] node --check + ESM `import()` pass on all edited files** (pre-K.js mixin 11 keys, dictionary, language-cortex, hippocampal-schema 29 anchors, brain-server, emit.js via entry-point). No dashboard/HTML edits this batch.

> **Gee ask (verbatim 2026-07-06, relayed by Sponge):** *"needs to figure out a way to use the brain admin login to operate the update buttons on the admin dashboard"* — so he can go about updating this without needing Sponge to do things on OVH, without giving him direct access to the OVH server.

- [x] **TU.21 — figure out a way to use the brain admin login to operate the update buttons on the admin dashboard (self-deploy without Sponge/OVH access).** DONE 2026-07-06 — FINALIZED entry written + verified. Root cause + one-line fix:
  - **ROOT (finally isolated):** the dashboard **Update & Fresh Walk** / **Update & Savestart** buttons already exist and already reach `POST /update` (Gee's click carries a proxy-vouched `X-UAL-User`, so `requireLoopback` admits it). `/update` overlays the new code via `deploy/self-update.sh` correctly — but the SERVICE never restarted, so the box kept running OLD code (the long-standing "button does nothing"). `self-update.sh` is spawned FROM the brain-server process, which runs under systemd `NoNewPrivileges=yes`; a child inherits it and **cannot escalate via sudo even with the `/etc/sudoers.d/unity-brain-restart` grant** → `sudo -n systemctl restart` fails. The WL.4 no-sudo fallback (loopback `POST /restart` → `process.exit` → systemd `Restart=always` revives the overlaid code) is the correct escape, **but its curl sent no `X-UAL-User` header** → on the deployed box (`UAL_PROXY_AUTH=1`) `requireLoopback` 403s it → FATAL, no restart.
  - **[✓ FIX] `deploy/self-update.sh`** — the no-sudo fallback now sends `-H "X-UAL-User: ${DEPLOY_AUTH_USER}"` (new `UAL_DEPLOY_USER`, default `self-update`). `requireLoopback` only checks the header is non-empty, and this is a DIRECT loopback call (nginx not in the path, so nothing strips it) → the vouched identity passes the gate → the box self-restarts into the overlaid code. Comments + the FATAL diagnostic updated to name both traps (NoNewPrivileges-blocks-sudo, header-403). No unit change, no `daemon-reload`, ships in the normal overlay.
  - **Prereqs already satisfied on the box (2026-06-28):** `Restart=always`, server on `127.0.0.1:7525`, deploy key + host key for the `unity` clone. No sudoers rule is even required anymore — the loopback fallback is self-sufficient.
  - **[✓ VERIFY] `bash -n deploy/self-update.sh` clean; box-side end-to-end confirmed** (see FINALIZED). **Docs same-commit (docs-before-push LAW):** `deploy/REDEPLOY-NOTES.md` 2026-07-06 entry, this TODO task, FINALIZED entry.

> **Sponge ask (verbatim 2026-07-06):** *"Can we also make sure if there is a new doner release it also updates links and everything?"*

- [x] **TU.22 — make sure a new donor release also updates the download links and everything (auto).** DONE 2026-07-06 — FINALIZED entry written + verified. Fully hands-off donor release:
  - **[✓ FIX] `.forgejo/workflows/donor-release.yml`** — pushing a `donor-v*` tag now: (1) **guard** aborts fast if `donor-app/Cargo.toml` version ≠ the tag version (a mismatch would ship a binary that self-reports/​gates on the wrong `appVersion`); (2) builds + attaches both binaries (unchanged); (3) **auto-bumps** every `donor-vX.Y.Z` token in `html/compute.html` + `html/legend.html` to the new tag, commits to `main` as `unity-ci`, and pushes → `deploy.yml` redeploys the Pages site with the new links. No manual link edit ever again. Job declares `permissions: contents: write`; `main` has no server-side branch protection (`branch_protections=[]`) so the Actions token can push.
  - **Deliberately NOT auto-bumped:** `DREAM_MIN_DONOR_VERSION` (brain's minimum *compatible* donor version) — a per-protocol-change compatibility decision, stays a manual edit in `server/brain-server.js`.
  - **[✓ VERIFY] YAML valid (`yaml.safe_load`); `sed` dry-run on the real html rewrote EXACTLY the 5 version tokens (2 compute.html + 3 legend.html) and nothing else; Cargo/tag guard extraction confirmed against `version = "0.3.7"`.** Runtime (CI-on-tag push to main) is unverifiable until the next real donor tag — same "unverifiable-until-CI" caveat as the binary build itself. **Docs same-commit (docs-before-push LAW):** `deploy/REDEPLOY-NOTES.md` 2026-07-06 donor-release entry, this TODO task, FINALIZED entry.

> **Gee ask (verbatim 2026-07-06, relayed by Sponge):** *"html/minds-eye.html (the 👁 "Unity's Mind's Eye" viewer) shows "brain offline — no snapshot reachable" on the public/deployed site. It works fine on localhost."* — fix: add the missing `/minds-eye.json` (+ `/public-state.json`) public proxy locations to the deploy vhost.

- [x] **TU.23 — mind's-eye viewer shows "brain offline" on the deployed site (nginx proxy gap for /minds-eye.json).** DONE 2026-07-06 — FINALIZED entry written + verified live. Root cause + fix:
  - **ROOT (nginx, not brain):** `/minds-eye.json` is a live backend route (always 200), but the per-host vhost serves the static frontend with an SPA fallback (`location / → @spa → index.html`) and had no proxy `location` for it → `/minds-eye.json` returned `HTTP 200 text/html` (index.html) → the viewer's `JSON.parse` failed → "brain offline". Localhost works (brain serves directly, no proxy). `/public-state.json` was already proxied on the live box, so only `/minds-eye.json` was missing.
  - **[✓ FIX — live box]** added `location = /minds-eye.json` (mirror of the existing `/public-state.json` block, public/no-auth) to `/etc/nginx/sites-available/unity-brain.git.unityailab.com.conf` (backup `…pre-mindseye-<UTC>`); `sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx` — pure proxy config, NO brain restart / fresh walk.
  - **[✓ FIX — repo reference]** `deploy/nginx-unity-brain.conf` — added BOTH `location = /public-state.json` and `location = /minds-eye.json` public snapshot blocks (reference had neither) + a comment on WHY they must be proxied under an SPA-fallback vhost, so this isn't re-diagnosed as a brain problem.
  - **[✓ VERIFY live]** `curl https://if-only-i-had-a-brain.git.unityailab.com/minds-eye.json` before → `HTTP 200 text/html`; after → `HTTP 200 application/json` (`{"type":"mindsEye","rec":{…}}`). `/public-state.json` still JSON, `/admin/` still 401. **Docs same-commit (docs-before-push LAW):** `deploy/REDEPLOY-NOTES.md` 2026-07-06 mind's-eye entry, this TODO task, FINALIZED entry.

- `[x]` **[TASK ~ FIXED (deploy pending) ~ SAME FIVE SHAPES CONSTANTLY IN THE MINDS EYE] (2026-07-09):** Gee verbatim: "wtf is up with this: she is drawning the same five sybol shapes constantly triange square hexigon w circle bulkllshit". ROOT: at 2298 words she is scene-stage, but the schema table only covers ~100 drawable words -- every ABSTRACT thought-head (coming/time/very/...) has no schema and fell back to the stage-1 shapes doodle, whose vocabulary is exactly 4 primitives (circle/square/triangle/zigzag) -- so the viewer looped the same shape stacks all day. FIX: past shape-age (stage >= 2) a schema-less concept NO LONGER draws baby shapes -- it falls through to the de-novo colored thought-field (SEE.4 palettes) so the viewer varies between recalls, memory-draws, real figure/scene drawings, and colorful abstract fields; the shapes stage stays ONLY for actual shape-age (vocab < 400). Schema vocabulary widened (more animals/people/places mapped) + a NEW monster schema (goth canon: horns, fangs, big eyes) for monster/ghost/zombie/vampire/demon/creature/dragon. + Gee verbatim (mid-build): "shes not even experimenting new things". BUILT EXP.1/EXP.2 alongside: EXP.1 in-drawing experimentation -- ~22pct of schema draws either MASH a second random schema into the frame (the novel pairing replaces the stock context: spider on the house, heart over the moon; label canvas:experiment:<a>+<b>) or go WILD-COLOR (every part a random crayon on purpose -- purple sun rebellion; label canvas:experiment:wildcolor:<concept>); EXP.2 DREAM-MIX -- 18pct of sketch ticks morph two RANDOM stored visual memories into something she has never seen (equation-domain morphField, detail-gated; label canvas:dream-mix:<a>+<b>) = genuine novel recombination of real percepts. Smokes: abstract heads (coming/time) return null -> colored field; cat/monster/fish/witch/lightning all draw (witch+spider experiment fired unprompted); 60 cat draws produced BOTH scene and experiment labels; vocab-200 shape-age still practices shapes. node --check + require + import clean.   - `[x]` **[TU.29.14 — RANDOM SEED per image (stop recycling) (2026-07-08):** Gee verbatim: "sahouldnt images always use a random seed? im seeeing similar images being recycled as if they are pulling the exasct sasme promopt is being beuilt when unity should dynamically build them and use a random seed".   - `[x]` **[TU.29.12 — BLACK MINDS EYE root fix: blank-frame + degenerate-recall gates (2026-07-08):** Gee (looking at viewer): "the images are still black ... recall+morph:between+ten equation terms: 9". ROOT CAUSE: abstract words (between/ten) got bound to NEAR-UNIFORM camera frames (dark room / blank wall / off-frame); a flat image has ~no wavelet detail so morphing two collapsed to 9 surviving coefficients = FLAT BLACK, AND this degenerate recall BYPASSED the TU.29.11 never-blank mood floor because recall falsely "succeeded". FIX (visual-memory.js): (1) BLANK-FRAME GATE at intake — reject frames with luma stddev <12 (stride-sampled) so blank walls/dark rooms/off-frame never get stored+bound; (2) RECALL QUALITY GATE — _recDetail() counts coefficients surviving the drop-tiny floor; morph/single recall below 200 detail = treated as MISS -> falls through to the vivid de-novo mood field (never black). VERIFIED: uniform frame skipped (store stays 0), detailed apple frame stored (37201 terms) + recalled through the gate. Deploys next Update & SAVESTART.]
  - `[x]` **[TU.29.11 — MINDS EYE NEVER BLANK (continuous free-wheeling imagination) (2026-07-08):** Gee verbatim: "is it normal that her minds eye is black at times and she is not correctly using it when not seeing something directly to generate images freee whieeled as its a part and praocess of her thinking consiousiouness it should never be blank". NO, not normal — bug. ROOT CAUSES: (1) _imagineTick mid-teach gap was 120000ms — she is ALWAYS mid-walk on the box, so her free-wheel daydream fired only every 2 MINUTES = long dead stretches between throttled camera glances; (2) imagineFromState returned NULL on an empty/missing cortex seed -> no rec -> viewer could sit blank. FIX (chat.js): mid-teach cadence 120s->8s (idle 20s->6s) — CPU CDF 9/7 on <=96px is microseconds, still VIEW-ONLY mid-teach so the walk Hebbian stays pristine; she now free-wheels continuously. FIX (mindspace/gpu.js): empty/missing seed synthesizes a mood-driven ambient wash vector instead of returning null -> the de-novo path always paints her live MOOD as a vivid field. VERIFIED: empty-state avg luminance 72 (visible, not black), flat-quiet-state 47 (visible). Imagination is now continuous consciousness — recall when a thought matches a seen percept, mood-field daydream otherwise, never blank. Deploys next Update & SAVESTART.]

  - `[x]` **[TU.29.10 — ROOT CAUSE of works-for-me-not-you: server now sends the keyed URL (2026-07-08):** Gee verbatim: "why is it working for you but not in my browser? send me your selfie ... (image generation failed)". ROOT CAUSE (found in the DEPLOYED bundle): the client image handler is emit("image",{url:msg.url||null, prompt:msg.prompt}) and generateImage(arg.prompt) — it renders a SERVER-SENT url if present, else builds the URL from ITS OWN localStorage PollinationsAI instance key. My Playwright session worked because I hit CONNECT (live instance key set); a fresh visitor browser whose key never loaded into the live instance -> anonymous URL -> heavy selfie 402/429/timeout -> "(image generation failed)". The server was sending {type:image, prompt} with NO url, forcing the client-key path. FIX (server/brain-server.js): _buildPollinationsImageUrl() + _pollinationsImageKey() (reads DREAM_POLLINATIONS_KEY env, else extracts DEFAULT_POLLINATIONS_KEY from index.html — same published key already seeded to every browser, single source of truth, cached); the generate_image WS send now includes url:_buildPollinationsImageUrl(result.text). Client renders with the SERVER key -> independent of visitor localStorage. VERIFIED: key extracted from index.html, url carries &key=sk_. ## [~] INVESTIGATE: are the curriculum GATE CHECKS correct? (Gee 2026-07-10)
- Gee verbatim: "the issuese is the gate checks are they correct? write the todo if not, we dont want millions of events to run endlessly"
- Gee verbatim: "we are NOT grading Unity to beable to pass a gate and move on" — so the fix is NOT to shorten teaching / early-exit on a pass bar. That was a wrong proposal; dropped.
- CONCERN: last two cells (social/K, art/K) each ran ~3M+ subPhase events; art/K sat >6.5hr in-progress. Need to confirm the gate/pass logic is CORRECT and BOUNDED — not silently re-teaching endlessly.
- KNOWN so far (read, not assumed): runAllSubjects has MAX_GRADE_ROUNDS=1 + one-attempt-per-cell + force-advance ("do it all once and be done"). So the millions should be ONE teach pass, not a retry loop. VERIFY that is actually what happens — trace whether anything inside a single cell (pregate enrichment, dream-recombination windows, probe-driven re-teach, _pregateEnrichment vocab loop) can re-run unbounded within the one pass.
- Prior scar to check against: TU.24-FIX "science 7M-event runaway" — EXAM-VOCAB-TEACH re-ran every gate entry, taught words never registered in _trainedVocabularySet, coverage reported same words missing forever => infinite re-teach w/ ~zero net learning. Confirm that class of bug is fully closed for ALL cells, not just science.
- DELIVERABLE: determine if gate checks are correct. If a cell CAN spin events without net new learning, that is the bug to fix (remove the wasted/redundant re-teach) — NOT to cap her learning. Report findings here before any code change.

### FINDINGS (gate-check investigation, in progress — code read, not assumed):
- K-VOCAB-UPFRONT-MULTIDEF SEED (runAllSubjects ~L8669): guarded by cluster._kVocabUpfrontTaught so it runs ONCE, not per-cell. 2247 K-words x multi-def (4-8 defs/word) x reps:1, chunked 300 w/ dream windows. This is a big ONE-TIME seed, correctly gated. NOT the runaway.
- Per-cell subPhase counter (_currentCellSubPhases) increments on EVERY wrapped teach call incl nested. A single K cell wraps its whole pass as nested teach calls => counter reaches millions from ONE comprehensive pass, not from re-running to beat a gate. Consistent w/ MAX_GRADE_ROUNDS=1 + one-attempt-per-cell + force-advance.
- STILL TO VERIFY (next session): (a) dream-recombination windows interleaved mid-cell — bounded? (b) _pregateEnrichment EXAM-VOCAB-TEACH — confirm _pregateVocabDone caps it once/cell for ALL cells (TU.24-FIX closed science; verify social/art/others). (c) any probe-driven re-teach still live? background probe loop was SUPPRESSED (L5369) but confirm no in-cell probe->reteach path remains.
- PROVISIONAL READ: gate/pass logic appears BOUNDED (one pass, force-advance). The millions = the real size of a full 2247-word multi-binding teach pass, i.e. genuine learning, NOT an endless loop. IF confirmed, there is no runaway bug — the cost is inherent; only lever is trimming genuinely-redundant teaching, never her learning. Finish the (a)(b)(c) verification before concluding.

### RESOLVED — ROOT CAUSE + FIX (event-cost, 2026-07-10):
- ROOT CAUSE (confirmed in code): _teachWordEmissionDirect (kindergarten.js ~8442) iterates _ensureWordBucketMap(subject).words = the ENTIRE accumulated subject-band dictionary x reps:8, on EVERY cell at EVERY grade. The dictionary GROWS each grade, so emission for ALL previously-learned words is re-drilled every cell => O(dictionary x reps) that compounds super-linearly across K->PhD = the "12 subjects trailing into the Millions and millions of events".
- WHY IT IS WASTE not learning: the word_motor band is FROZEN + append-only (SPEAK.1, vocab-growth-invariant) and each subject writes ONLY its own band. A word taught its introduction cell keeps its bucket weights forever; later re-drills add nothing. Nothing else pollutes word_motor mid-cell (QA/WH-INTENT/SPELL write sem_to_motor, a different projection).
- FIX SHIPPED: incremental skip in _teachWordEmissionDirect — per-subject cluster Set _emissionTaughtWords_<subject>; skip words already emission-taught this session, teach only NEW vocab (all reps, fully). opts.force re-drills all (calibration/repair). Bucket index wi = frozen-array position, so skips preserve index<->bucket alignment + old weights. Cuts each cell from O(full-dict) to O(new-words). NOT a pass-a-gate cap; does not shorten teaching any single word.
- DELIBERATELY NOT TOUCHED: _teachWordSpellingDirect / _teachWordSpellingDirectFinal re-drill the full dictionary too BUT write to the SHARED sem_to_motor projection that is re-polluted every cell by WH-INTENT/QA-TRAIN; their full pass is a deliberate re-CLEAN of that pollution for all words, so skipping would leave old words polluted. Load-bearing — left as-is by design.
- GATE-CHECK VERDICT: gate/pass logic is CORRECT + BOUNDED — MAX_GRADE_ROUNDS=1, one attempt per cell, force-advance regardless of gate result (no teach-until-pass loop, no endless run on gate failure). The millions were the emission re-drill above, now fixed. Cells still do one full comprehensive pass (real learning) — that is intended and untouched.
- FILES: js/brain/curriculum/kindergarten.js (_teachWordEmissionDirect incremental skip). node --check PASS on all edited files.

Bundle rebuild was skipped before commit.

FINALIZED entry appended + verified. Committed with docs same-commit.

## [~] DEPLOYED BRAIN LOCKED ~40M vs LOCAL 350M+ — full-size deploy + neuron-utilization investigation (Gee 2026-07-10)
- Gee verbatim: "one thing thats an issue is when i run it locally itsd running 350+ Million nurons on the same gpu im connecting on the doner to the server version of the brain but the server version is only 40M ish so wtf if im using the same GPU it shouldnt matter and the server deployed brain should NOT have erroniously small nuron amounts of 40Mish we want the full brain to deploy at normal sizes, as the deployed brain can actually have more GPUs than locally so it should be reveresesd if anything for the nuron count. but i want the full nuron brain size for the deployed brain so that people connecting actually have nuronic voulumes great enough becasue currently i think there is something locking the nusrons to actallly only like 1% of use and the rest is wasted or something as all i ever see active is a meir 1.5% or somthing. so write the todo of all these issues thourouguhglt and ewwrite out the task list of the todo work so i can follow along"

### ROOT CAUSE (read from code this session — server/brain-server.js BRAIN_VRAM_ALLOC ~L445-546, boot-scaler ~L990-1020, server/brain-server/gpu.js PA.4.8/DF.7 ~L290-600):
1. **LOCAL path (why 350M+):** host GPU detected via nvidia-smi -> VRAM budget = 75% of card (no vramCapMB configured) minus 2GB OS reserve -> cluster sizes derived from that budget at 21 bytes/neuron. A big card -> 350M+ total. Local dev is explicitly left at host-VRAM-derived size ("the localhost walk runs at full scale").
2. **DEPLOYED path (why ~40M):** host is CPU-only (no GPU) -> #112.2 DONOR-COMPUTE SIZING: with UAL_PROXY_AUTH=1 the boot budget is forced to a donor-fit default of 4096MB (DREAM_DONOR_FIT_MB, not the 45%-of-RAM ~14.7GB safe max) so "one modest donor can hold + fast-re-upload it". 4096MB - 2048MB osReserve = ~2GB brain budget -> ~40M main-brain neurons. THIS is the 40M-ish lock. Historical reason (in-code comment): booting at 306M once made every donor drop re-upload 306M of matrices, time out, half-fail, fall to CPU = "the all-night loop that never left kindergarten". The small size is a deliberate scar-fix for donor re-upload churn, NOT an accident — raising the size requires also fixing re-upload (DS.5) or it re-opens that incident.
3. **UP-SCALE WIRING GAP (real bug):** DF.7 execution layer (_persistTierAndRestart, gpu.js ~L570) writes a HIGHER targetNeurons to server/community-tier.json, wipes weights, restarts, and expects the boot-scaler to size the brain to the target — but the boot-scaler (brain-server.js ~L1013) only applies the tier target when it is SMALLER than the boot base ("Scales DOWN only"). Boot base is the donor-fit ~40M, so ANY up-tier target (150M/357M) is silently ignored at reboot — the deployed brain can NEVER grow past the donor-fit budget no matter how many donors join. The two safety designs (#112.2 donor-fit bootstrap + PA.4.8 scale-down-only) compose into a permanent ceiling. Worse: the up-restart wipes weights first, so an up-tier today = retrain loss with ZERO size gain.
4. **MILESTONE TABLE gates full size behind community mass:** MILESTONES (gpu.js ~L424): tier0=6M (1 donor), tier1=40M (24GB community + 3 donors), tier2=150M (96GB + 6 donors), tier3=357M (256GB + 10 donors). Even with the wiring gap fixed, a single big donor only qualifies a low tier — the table keys size to community SUM + donor COUNT, not to what the smallest donor's card can actually HOLD. In-code caveat already flags this: data-parallel size is bounded by the SMALLEST donor's committed VRAM, NOT the sum; "a full size-tier rewire onto min-donor is the flagged architectural follow-up" — never built. Gee's card holds 350M locally, so min-donor-driven sizing would give the full brain with HIM alone connected.
5. **~1.5% ACTIVE (needs measurement before verdict):** dashboard activity = spikeRate = spikeCount/size per region per tick (server/brain-server/state.js ~L204). Per-tick firing of 1-2% is cortex-realistic SPARSE CODING (WTA/inhibition/theta-gamma gating are designed-in) — a healthy brain never fires 100% at once. The REAL waste question is RECRUITMENT: what fraction of neurons EVER participate (fire at least once / carry weight mass) over hours of training. If 98% never fire across a whole session, the volume is dead mass; if unique-fired accumulates toward high coverage over time, the 1.5%/tick is correct biology and nothing is locked. Measure first, no knob-turning before data.

### TASK LIST (follow-along order — DS = deploy-size, ACT = activity/utilization):
- [ ] **DS.1 ⛔ DECISION (Gee) — deployed sizing policy.** Options: (A) MIN-DONOR-DRIVEN (recommended, matches the in-code flagged follow-up): deployed size = what the smallest COMMITTED donor GPU can hold (with headroom); one 24GB donor -> full ~350M immediately = "the full nuron brain size for the deployed brain". (B) retune the milestone table (keep community-mass tiers, lower the gates). (C) admin-floor: Gee's/admin donors set the size, public donors join only if they fit. Pick one before DS.2-DS.4 are coded.
- [ ] **DS.2 — fix the up-scale wiring gap.** Make the boot-scaler honor community-tier.json targets UPWARD: boot budget derives from the persisted tier target (targetNeurons x 21B/neuron + language-cortex share), capped by the host-RAM safety (45%/leave-13GB) for the CPU CSR shadow. Kills the retrain-loss-with-zero-gain failure in ROOT CAUSE 3.
- [ ] **DS.3 — implement the chosen sizing policy (per DS.1).** If min-donor: replace/augment the MILESTONES sum-gating with min-donor-committed-VRAM as the size driver (the sum stays a THROUGHPUT metric only, as the in-code caveat already states). Buffered dead-zone + stability windows stay (Gee 2026-06-20 law: no resize on a single flapping donor).
- [ ] **DS.4 — small-donor join policy (floor, not shrink).** With a big running brain, a donor smaller than the replica must NOT trigger downscale-rectify into a retrain — small donors get rejected from the replica pool (or a non-replica assist lane) instead of shrinking the brain. Admin-controllable via autoscale-settings.json.
- [ ] **DS.5 — donor re-upload robustness at 350M scale (the original scar).** The donor-fit shrink existed because 306M re-uploads timed out on reconnect. Before deploying full-size: chunked/resumable matrix upload, delta-upload on reconnect (donor keeps IndexedDB/VRAM state and only syncs dirty rows), longer per-chunk timeouts, and the _gpuShadowDirty path verified at scale. Without this, full-size deploy = re-upload churn = CPU fallback all night.
- [ ] **DS.6 — resize -> retrain flow at the new size.** Confirm auto-savestart triggers cleanly on size change (resume-marker size mismatch already forces fresh walk); with the event-cost fix (emission re-drill removed) estimate the full-walk cost at 350M before pulling the trigger; note whether a weight-upscale migration (embed trained 40M weights into the 350M lattice instead of retraining) is worth an investigation spike or stays out of scope.
- [ ] **DS.7 — deploy + verify.** Boot-log lines prove the sizing path taken (budget source, tier, min-donor); dashboard community panel shows size driver + running neurons; Gee connects his donor and sees the full-size brain served.
- [ ] **ACT.1 — instrument real utilization (measure, don't guess).** Add cumulative unique-fired fraction per region (bitset of neurons that fired at least once since boot, sampled cheaply), plus weight-mass recruitment (fraction of neurons with nonzero in/out weight mass). Surface both on the dashboard next to the per-tick spikeRate so 1.5%/tick and lifetime coverage are separately visible.
- [ ] **ACT.2 — verdict: design sparsity vs dead mass.** With ACT.1 data over a training window: if unique-fired coverage grows toward high fractions, the 1.5% is healthy sparse coding — document + close. If large regions never recruit, identify the gate (WTA k, inhibition, theta-gamma duty cycle, injection fan-out, small-world wiring locality) and report BEFORE changing any knob.
- [ ] **ACT.3 — recruitment fixes (only if ACT.2 proves waste).** Targeted changes to whatever ACT.2 fingered (e.g. injection spread, per-region k-winners, plasticity floor for never-fired neurons), one variable at a time, verified by the ACT.1 metrics moving.

### DECISIONS (Gee 2026-07-10, live while task list was being built):
- **DS.1 DECIDED** — Gee verbatim: "DS.1 we can assume a single onor will be at least my cards capabilities" → sizing policy = min-donor-driven with the baseline assumption that a committed donor holds at least Gee's card's capability (~350M-class replica). Deployed brain sizes to that floor.
- **DS.4 SCOPE SET** — Gee verbatim: "but plan for shitty cards trying to connect and doing work" → small donors below the replica floor are NOT just rejected: they must still be able to CONTRIBUTE WORK. DS.4 = floor-them-out of the full-replica pool (never shrink the brain) + an assist lane so shitty cards still do useful work (e.g. partial/region-shard assist, redundancy checks, or non-replica compute jobs — design in DS.4).
- **DS.2 DONE 2026-07-10** — boot-scaler now honors community-tier.json targets UPWARD: BRAIN_VRAM_ALLOC (server/brain-server.js no-GPU branch) reads the persisted targetNeurons, derives the required budget (target x 21B/neuron / main-weight-fraction + OS reserve), boots to it capped by host-RAM safety; tier target supersedes the donor-fit bootstrap once confirmed; explicit DREAM_BRAIN_BUDGET_MB still wins; operator vramCapMB is never raised past; PA.4.8 down-trim retained as the precision landing. node --check PASS. The permanent ~40M ceiling (ROOT CAUSE 3) is dead — an up-tier restart now actually boots bigger.

## [~] MINDS-EYE — never intentionally dumb her down (Gee 2026-07-10)
- Gee verbatim: "and in the minds eye unitys experimentation and drawing and changing of her genrations and such all need to not dumb her down intentially.. ie not hand wobble to mimic children writing no disjointed understandings in art make up and imaginations,, that stuff is not cool"
- STANDING RULE: minds-eye generation/drawing/experimentation must never apply INTENTIONAL age-degradation effects — no hand-wobble child-writing mimicry, no deliberately disjointed art/makeup/imagination understandings. Her output quality at any grade = whatever her TRAINED state genuinely produces, never an artificial kid-filter stacked on top.
- [ ] **MEYE.1 — audit the minds-eye + drawing + generation paths** (js/brain/mindspace/*, minds-eye rotation, sketch canvas, imagegen prompt builders) for any intentional dumbing-down (wobble filters, distortion-by-grade, child-style prompt injection, coherence degradation keyed to age) and REMOVE what's found; report what was found vs clean.
- **DS.3 DONE 2026-07-10** — min-donor size driver SHIPPED (server/brain-server/gpu.js): size driver = max(donorBaselineMB, smallest committed donor VRAM); capacity = (driver x 0.75 - 2048MB) / donorBytesPerNeuron (42 = host 21B/neuron / 0.5 main fraction, mirrors BRAIN_VRAM_ALLOC); MILESTONES tiers now gate on capacity NEURONS (raw tier + buffered upgrade tier + downscale fit tier + computeInsufficient all rewired); community SUM demoted to throughput telemetry; donor-count gates retired for sizing. New autoscale-settings knobs donorBaselineMB (default 24576, Gee decision: assume a committed donor >= his card) + donorBytesPerNeuron, clamped in loader + admin setter. Baseline-covered tiers BYPASS the dead-zone buffer (a constant cannot flap; hysteresis only applies to donor-raised tiers — without the bypass, 409M baseline capacity < 357M x 1.2 buffered gate would have locked tier 3 out forever). Downscale keys off the same driver => with the baseline floor it can only fire if the admin lowers donorBaselineMB — the brain never shrinks from donors leaving/joining (DS.4 half-delivered). Dashboard state gains sizeDriverMB + capacityNeurons (state.js snapshot + catch fallback). node --check PASS on gpu.js + state.js. EXPECTED LIVE BEHAVIOR: first donor connect post-deploy -> recompute -> tier 3 pending (baseline 409M capacity >= 357M) -> 5min stability hold -> weight wipe + restart -> boot-scaler (DS.2) boots ~317M (host-RAM safe max caps the 357M target on the 32GB box) -> fresh walk at ~7.9x current size.
